title: Dregea stellaris
intro: Dregea stellaris, also known as Starfish Plant or Moonflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its potential to treat fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its numerous health benefits. Bioactive constituents of Dregea stellaris include alkaloids, flavonoids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Dregea stellaris include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
taxonomy: Dregea stellaris is classified in the family Apocynaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This family is a part of the order Gentianales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The order Gentianales is part of the clade Asterids, a group of flowering plants that also includes the families Ericaceae, Campanulaceae, and Solanaceae. The clade Asterids is part of the larger clade Eudicots, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes the families Rosaceae, Fabaceae, and Brassicaceae. The clade Eudicots is part of the larger clade Angiosperms, which includes all flowering plants.
